name: header-editor-pro-free
description: Professional HTTP header editor for web developers, API testing, and debugging - completely free with unlimited profiles

scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && npm run create-source-package && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../../firefox-addon.zip .
scripts.create-source-package: zip -r source-code.zip src/ package*.json rspack.*.js BUILD_INSTRUCTIONS.md README.md
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox

author: testacode.com
